markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, kick off the approval process, and review new AI tracking data.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Approval:** Fieldguide's Content Marketer, Amanda, will select \~15 topics from the Content OS by Friday morning. This provides a buffer for GrowthX to narrow the final list to 8–10, balancing high-volume keywords with lower-difficulty ones for faster traction.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [**Calibration Blog:** The first draft is due next Tuesday/Wednesday. It will be a refresh of the "Leveraging AI for Efficient PCI Assessments" post, chosen as a low-risk, factual topic to align on voice and tone before scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Tracking:** GrowthX shared initial data from its "Scrunch" tool, showing Fieldguide's AI presence at \~10% vs. competitor AuditBoard's 31%. GrowthX will provide a Loom recording of the demo for Fieldguide to share internally.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
  - [**Decision-Making Protocol:** Amanda (Content) and D (Product) are the final approvers for their respective domains. Comparison articles are paused until initial content proves its value.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Approval

  - [GrowthX presented the Content OS (Airtable) with topics from a keyword gap analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build topical authority (top-of-funnel) and capture bottom-of-funnel interest (e.g., listicles).](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
      - [**Metrics:** Each topic includes primary keyword, search volume, and keyword difficulty.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [The initial goal is to approve 8–10 topics to create a buffer for the production cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)
  - [**Decision:** The first blog will be a refresh of the "Leveraging AI for Efficient PCI Assessments" post.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Chosen as a low-risk, factual topic to calibrate on voice and tone before scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
      - [**Keyword:** Optimize for "AI PCI compliance."](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
      - [**Cluster:** Cybersecurity and Privacy.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)

### AI Visibility Tracking ("Scrunch")

  - [GrowthX demoed its "Scrunch" tool, which tracks AI presence by sending 25 daily prompts to 7 platforms (e.g., Perplexity, Google).](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
      - [**Fieldguide Presence:** \~10% (cited in \~10% of responses).](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
      - [**Competitor (AuditBoard) Presence:** 31%.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1403.0)
      - [**Key Insight:** Perplexity is frequently citing and mentioning Fieldguide, indicating it's using fresh content.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [**Methodology:** The tool uses free, memory-less versions of LLMs to ensure a fresh, unbiased query each time.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
  - [**Future:** The prompt list will expand to cover product deep-dive topics. The north star metric will be "LLM referral rate" in Google Analytics.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)

### Operational Logistics

  - [**Brand Assets:** GrowthX needs brand assets (Canva/Figma files) for its designer to create on-brand featured images.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [**HubSpot Access:** GrowthX requires HubSpot access to publish blogs using Fieldguide's existing templates.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [**Project Management:** Yasine and Jenny will set up a Monday.com board to manage the content approval workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Yasine:**](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
      - [Ask Amanda to select \~15 preferred topics from the Content OS by Friday morning.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
      - [Coordinate with Jenny to set up the Monday.com approval board.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
      - [Investigate granting HubSpot access to GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1329.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
      - [Record a Loom demo of the "Scrunch" dashboard for Fieldguide to share internally.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
      - [Add Amanda to the Content OS (Airtable) with commenter access.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
      - [Draft the "PCI Assessments" calibration blog, due for review next Tuesday/Wednesday.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)
      - [Begin creating on-brand featured image concepts for review.](https://fathom.video/share/sdQFcBo_qm9oB6F3UdygT1eVi44-qqQS?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
